name: osint-agent
description: Çok ajanlı açık kaynak istihbarat sistemi — OSINT Digital Müfettiş

scripts.test:unit: OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-placeholder node --import tsx --test src/lib/chatHistory.test.ts src/lib/agentSession.test.ts src/lib/providerContextBuilder.test.ts src/lib/llmTelemetry.test.ts src/lib/sessionStore.test.ts src/lib/sessionGraph.test.ts src/tools/githubGpgUtils.test.ts src/lib/osintHeuristics.test.ts src/tools/sherlockTool.test.ts src/tools/githubTool.test.ts src/agents/baseAgent.test.ts src/agents/identityAgent.test.ts src/agents/reviewContinuation.test.ts src/agents/strategyOrchestrator.test.ts src/agents/smokeTestHarness.test.ts src/lib/sourceCredibility.test.ts src/ui/transcriptViewport.test.ts src/lib/graphConfidence.test.ts src/lib/bloomFilter.test.ts src/lib/toolRegistry.test.ts
scripts.db:clear: NEO4J_ALLOW_CLEAR=1 node --env-file=.env --import tsx -e "import { clearGraph, getGraphStats, closeNeo4j } from './src/lib/neo4j.ts'; await clearGraph(); const s = await getGraphStats(); console.log('Graf temizlendi:', s.nodes, 'node'); await closeNeo4j()"
scripts.test:agent:unit: OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-placeholder node --import tsx --test src/lib/chatHistory.test.ts src/tools/githubGpgUtils.test.ts src/lib/osintHeuristics.test.ts src/agents/baseAgent.test.ts src/agents/identityAgent.test.ts src/agents/reviewContinuation.test.ts src/agents/strategyOrchestrator.test.ts
